onboarding.email.adminFooter: You can review the account after verification is complete.
onboarding.email.body: We just need to confirm your email to finish setting up your CRM workspace for {organizationName}.
onboarding.email.expiry: This link expires in 24 hours. If you didn't sign up, you can safely ignore this message.
onboarding.email.heading: Welcome to your CRM
onboarding.email.preview: Confirm your email to activate your CRM workspace
onboarding.email.subject: Confirm your email to get started
onboarding.errors.emailExists: We already have an account with this email. Try signing in or resetting your password.
onboarding.errors.emailSendFailed: We could not send the verification email. Please try again or contact support.
onboarding.errors.pendingRequest: We already sent a verification email. Please check your inbox or try again in {minutes} minutes.
onboarding.errors.termsRequired: Please accept the terms to continue.
onboarding.form.emailExists: We already have an account with this email. Try signing in or resetting your password.
onboarding.form.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
onboarding.form.successBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it within 24 hours to activate your workspace.
onboarding.form.termsLabel: I agree to the terms of service
onboarding.form.termsRequired: Please accept the terms to continue.
onboarding.subtitle: Set up your free CRM in 30 seconds.
onboarding.title: Get started
